summary: Comprehensive testing of Ready for Guests Connect cleaning service booking app completed successfully. All major features tested including landing page, admin login, dashboard functionality, client registration, booking flow, services listing, gallery display, and notifications system.
passed_tests: API Health Check - Backend connectivity verified
Admin Login - Successfully logged in with provided credentials (info.readyforguestssa@gmail.com / BigBoss2026)
Services API - 27 services properly seeded and accessible
Admin Stats API - Dashboard statistics working correctly
Teams API - Default 'Hibiscus Housekeepers' team found
Gallery API - 4 seeded gallery images accessible
Client Registration - New client account creation working
Booking Creation - Full booking workflow functional
Landing Page Load - Hero image and 'Navigate to App' button present
Admin Dashboard - All tabs (Overview, Bookings, Teams, Clients, Gallery) functional
Admin Dashboard Stats - Shows 1 total booking, 1 pending, 0 completed, 2 clients, 1 team
Client Dashboard - Welcome message and booking button working
Service Selection - All 27 services displayed with proper categorization
Gallery Display - 4 images properly displayed in admin gallery
Notifications System - Badge count and dropdown functionality working
Authentication Flow - Login/logout working for both admin and client roles
Booking Flow - 3-step process (service selection, date/time, property details) working

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major UI flows working, minor issues with form validation feedback
